extDesc: Make your own handy prompt tool

popup.contextSaveDesc: Select text, right-click and choose "Save as Prompt"
popup.shortcutWarning: No shortcut detected, experience may be affected.

content.title: Prompt Library
content.subtitle: Quickly insert preset Prompt content via commands in web input fields.
content.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt? This action cannot be undone.
content.categoryDisabled: Category for this prompt is disabled
content.tagDisabled: Tags for this prompt are disabled
content.author: Author

category.title: Category Management
category.subtitle: Manage your categories here, including adding, editing, deleting, and enabling/disabling categories.
category.nameExists: Category name already exists, please use another name.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Category: $1
deleteDialog.description: You are deleting a category that contains $1 prompts. Please choose how to handle these prompts.
deleteDialog.moveDesc: Move all prompts under this category to "Default" category, keeping data.
deleteDialog.deleteDesc: Permanently delete all prompts under this category, cannot be recovered.

tag.title: Tag Management
tag.subtitle: Manage your prompt tags. Renaming a tag will automatically update all associated prompts.
tag.nameExists: Tag name already exists, please use another name.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Tag: $1
deleteDialog.description: You are deleting a tag used by $1 prompts.
deleteDialog.moveDesc: Replace this tag with "Default" in associated prompts, keeping prompts.
deleteDialog.deleteDesc: Delete all prompts containing this tag (Caution).

sync.title: Sync Management
sync.subtitle: Configure multi-device sync services to ensure data safety and cross-device usage.

webdav.title: WebDAV Config
webdav.description: Backup using WebDAV supported cloud storage (e.g. Nutstore, Nextcloud).
webdav.maxBackupsDesc: Automatically delete oldest backups when exceeding this limit, default 30.
webdav.restoreDesc: Prioritize selected backup for restore, otherwise use the latest one.
webdav.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (starting with http:// or https://)

notion.title: Notion Config
notion.description: Sync prompts to Notion database, supports two-way sync.
notion.dbIdHelp1: Extract ID from Notion database page URL
notion.dbIdHelp2: Note: Notion sync truncates time to minutes (seconds fixed to 00), local and WebDAV retain second precision.
notion.invalidDbId: Database ID cannot be pure numbers, please enter a valid 32-digit ID

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.viewModeDesc: Choose between card or list view.
appearance.popupPositionDesc: Choose where the prompt picker appears when invoked via /p (Save dialog is always centered).

general.title: General
general.shortcutWarningDesc: Don't show warning if shortcuts are not set.
general.charityDesc: Show Baby Come Home charity info at the bottom of sidebar.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.configDesc: Go to browser extensions page to configure shortcuts.
